$comment: Display-only SMGP pit-wall advice keyed by the venue identity that moves with SmgpSeasonVariety. Selection is stable per displayed round and never enters the fold.
fallback: KEEP IT CLEAN. BRING THE CAR HOME.
WATCH THE MIRRORS. TAKE THE OPENING WHEN IT COMES.

San Marino: ATTACK THE KERBS. DO NOT GIVE AWAY THE CHICANES.
THE FIRST LAP IS YOUR CHANCE. MAKE IT COUNT.
Brazil: SAVE THE REARS THROUGH THE LONG TURNS. POWER OUT CLEAN.
THE BACK STRAIGHT IS THE MOVE. STAY CLOSE UNTIL THEN.
France: MISTRAL SPEED MATTERS. EXIT THE SLOW CORNER CLEAN.
DO NOT OVERWORK THE FRONT TYRES IN THE LONG RIGHT-HANDER.
Hungary: PASSING IS SCARCE. FORCE THE ERROR BEFORE THE TIGHT SECTION.
KEEP YOUR RHYTHM. ONE MISTAKE HERE COSTS THREE CORNERS.
West Germany: SLIPSTREAM FIRST. BRAKE LATE ONLY WHEN THE CAR IS STRAIGHT.
THE FAST SECTIONS REWARD COURAGE. THE CHICANES PUNISH GREED.
STAY OFF THE WALLS. ROTATE THE CAR AT THE HAIRPIN.
BRAKE TEMPERATURE IS EVERYTHING ON THIS STREET COURSE.
Canada: RIDE THE KERBS, BUT LEAVE THE FINAL WALL ALONE.
SET UP THE PASS BEFORE THE LAST CHICANE.
Great Britain: CARRY SPEED THROUGH THE FAST COMPLEX. TRUST THE CAR.
THE WIND WILL MOVE THE CAR. KEEP YOUR INPUTS QUIET.
Italy: SLIPSTREAM THE LEADERS. DEFEND THE FIRST CHICANE.
LOW DRAG, LATE BRAKING. DO NOT MISS THE EXIT.
Portugal: THE SURFACE CHANGES GRIP. BUILD THE LAP BEFORE YOU ATTACK.
PROTECT THE REAR TYRES THROUGH THE LONG FINAL TURN.
Spain: BRAKE DEEP INTO THE HAIRPIN. KEEP THE INSIDE COVERED.
SHORT STRAIGHTS MEAN TRACK POSITION. MAKE THE START COUNT.
Mexico: THE AIR IS THIN. WATCH TEMPERATURES AND BRAKING DISTANCE.
BE PATIENT IN THE STADIUM. THE EXIT OPENS THE PASS.
Japan: THE ESSES DECIDE THE LAP. ONE CLEAN ARC, NO CORRECTIONS.
SAVE SOMETHING FOR THE FINAL CHICANE. THAT IS THE OPENING.
Belgium: COMMIT UP THE HILL. DO NOT LIFT ONCE THE CAR IS SET.
WEATHER CAN TURN FAST. READ THE TRACK, NOT THE SKY.
Australia: THE WALLS CLOSE QUICKLY. ATTACK ONLY WITH A CLEAR EXIT.
BRAKES FIRST, TYRES SECOND. KEEP BOTH ALIVE TO THE FINISH.
Monaco: PASS THE CARS AT THE HAIRPIN TURN!
NO ROOM, NO MERCY. OWN THE HAIRPIN AND GUARD THE TUNNEL.
